title: Grow Luna X account by +200 followers

context.description:
Externally validated autonomy canary for Luna's X account.

Objective:
- prove that the autonomy loop can move a real public account toward growth milestones with daily feedback and tight guardrails
- keep execution aligned with Luna's public identity and OpenClaw's crypto market intelligence mission

Success criteria:
- M1: +25 net followers from baseline
- M2: +200 net followers from baseline
- progress is explained by scorecards, board packets, and auditable artifacts instead of vanity signal
